def positive_repeated_string_format_invariant_template():
    rule_id = "repeated_string_format_invariant_template"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "An invariant string template is formatted repeatedly in a loop instead of being partially precomputed."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
